title: chrysosplenium album f. naminoense
intro: Chrysosplenium album f. naminoense, also known as the White-fruited Golden Saxifrage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium album f. naminoense include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and acting as an anti-bacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and remedies for various health conditions.
